rule CDB_TCLBANKER_Malware_Targets_Users_Through_ {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for TCLBANKER Malware Targets Users Through Self-Propagating WhatsApp and Outlook Wo"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-05-09"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "WhatsApp" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
